title: Advice Surgeries - Liz Jarvis MP
text_excerpt: Advice Surgeries - Liz Jarvis MP Skip to main content Liz Jarvis MP About Liz News Campaigns Work in Parliament Newsletter Volunteer Contact Useful Links Donate Join Donate Join News Videos Campaigns Fix the broken SEND system End the A&E Crisis Bring back the no.61 Where's Our Police Station? End the Sewage Scandal Contact Safe Contacts Policy Advice Surgeries Privacy Policy Advice Surgeries To book an appointment for a surgery, or to speak to a member of Liz's team to get help or advice, simply email the office at liz.jarvis.mp@parliament.uk or write to Liz at Parliament. The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy . To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk . We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy . Promoted by the Liberal Democrats , First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU. Website by Prater Raines . This website uses cookies Please select the types of cookies you want to allow. Essential These are necessary for the website to function properly. Analytics These help us to understand how our visitors use our website. Marketing These allow us to display content from other websites that track you for advertising purposes.
